display.name: Snowflake Dashboard
display.description: This dashboard plots all the important metrics for Snowflake.

display.name: deployment_environment
display.description: The deployment environment for the service.

spec.queryValue:
SELECT DISTINCT(JSONExtractString(labels, 'deployment_environment'))
FROM signoz_metrics.time_series_v4
WHERE metric_name like '%snowflake%'

display.name: snowflake_account_name
display.description: Snowflake Account Name

spec.queryValue:
SELECT DISTINCT(JSONExtractString(labels, 'snowflake_account_name'))
FROM signoz_metrics.time_series_v4
WHERE metric_name like '%snowflake%'

display.name: Query Execution vs Query Compilation Time
display.description: Comparison between query execution and compilation times.

display.name: Average bytes scanned
display.description: Average number of bytes scanned in a snowflake account.

display.name: Total storage bytes
display.description: Number of bytes of table storage used, including bytes for data currently in Time Travel.

display.name: Total stage bytes
display.description: Number of bytes of stage storage used by files in all internal stages (named, table, user).

display.name: Average rows deleted
display.description: Average number of rows deleted in a table over the last 24 hour window.

display.name: Total logins
display.description: Total login attempts for account over the last 24 hour window.

display.name: Overall credits used
display.description: Reported total credits used across account over the last 24 hour window.

display.name: Average rows produced
display.description: Average number of rows produced in a table over the last 24 hour window.

display.name: Average bytes deleted
display.description: Average bytes deleted in a snowflake account.

display.name: Cloud Service credits used
display.description: Reported total credits used in the cloud service over the last 24 hour window.

display.name: Average bytes spilled to remote storage
display.description: Average bytes spilled (intermediate results do not fit in memory) by remote storage over the last 24 hour window.

spec.name: A
spec.legend: Average bytes spilled to remote storage

display.name: Total failsafe bytes
display.description: Number of bytes of data in Fail-safe.

display.name: Credits used by warehouse
display.description: Total credits used associated per warehouse over the last 24 hour window.

display.name: Virtual warehouse credits used
display.description: Reported total credits used by virtual warehouse service over the last 24 hour window.

display.name: Avg Session IDs per user
display.description: Distinct session id's associated with snowflake username over the last 24 hour window.

display.name: Average bytes written
display.description: Average bytes written in a snowflake account.

display.name: Average rows updated
display.description: Average number of rows updated in a table over the last 24 hour window.

display.name: Average rows inserted
display.description: Average number of rows inserted in a table over the last 24 hour window.

display.name: Average bytes spilled to local storage
display.description: Average bytes spilled (intermediate results do not fit in memory) by local storage over the last 24 hour window.

spec.name: A
spec.legend: Average bytes spilled to local storage

display.name: Top Queries Scanned
display.description: Average bytes scanned in a snowflake account based on query type.
